title: Maximum Transaction Each Day
description: Find transaction(s) with the maximum amount for each day. Include ties.
constraints: Multiple transactions on the same day with the same max amount must all be included
day is a DATETIME — use DATE(day) to extract the date portion
key_concept: Filter with (DATE(day), amount) IN (SELECT DATE(day), MAX(amount) ...).

hints.L1: For each day, find max amount. Return all transactions matching that max.
hints.L2: WHERE (DATE(day), amount) IN (SELECT DATE(day), MAX(amount) FROM Transactions GROUP BY DATE(day))
hints.L3: SELECT transaction_id FROM Transactions WHERE (DATE(day), amount) IN (SELECT DATE(day), MAX(amount) FROM Transactions GROUP BY DATE(day)) ORDER BY transaction_id
